form.formComment: Drawn inside box. At the last outing finished last in a Class 2/3 on April 10 over 520m at this track behind Crossfit Queen beaten 7 lengths (30.94). Can sneak into the finish.

form.formComment: Has won her last two. Good effort to score just three days ago over 457m at Manawatu by 2 lengths in a Class 2. Looks well placed to make it three straight.

form.formComment: Has placed the last couple. Ran 26.14 when second at Manawatu latest but the run prior he clocked a slick 30.15 over 520m finishing third at this track. Capable of a strong show.

form.formComment: Looks close to another win after her success on March 27 at Manawatu over 457m. Last start was third over 520m in 30.58, behind Crossfit Queen. The form out of the last run measures up. Among the chances on best.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Manawatu (26.30) in a Class 3, finishing a 6 length fourth. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Ascot Park over 390m. Last start finished 6th in a Class 2/3 on April 10 over 520m at this track behind Crossfit Queen beaten 5.5 lengths (30.82). Brought a two-start winning streak to an end last time when he missing the frame. Gets chance to atone.
